title: Hyphen protocol v0 error payload
description: Validates envelope.payload when type=error (docs/protocol/hyphen-protocol-v0.md §8). The code enum IS the normative v0 error registry — adding a code is a reviewed schema change, linted by scripts/lint_error_registry.py. The message MUST NOT contain notification bodies, file contents, full paths, or addresses beyond what the user already sees; that rule is enforced by redaction tests (HYP-M4-001..003), not this schema.

regarding.description: messageId that provoked this error, when attributable

retryable.description: true = same operation may be retried; trust/fingerprint-mismatch is never retryable
